name: Comic Party Wars 2
wikitext_excerpt:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Comic Party Wars: Comic Party 2}} {{2 Column Flex|flex1=7|flex2=3|reverse=yes |content1= {{Content Box|content=
[[File:CPW2 Logo.png|class=flex-image|link=]]
'''Comic Party Wars: Comic Party 2''' or more commonly '''Comic Party Wars 2''' is a Fighter Maker 95 game made by Run-Liatto or rariattou. It is the second game in the Comic Party Wars series and by far the most complete. It was last updated some time in September of 2001.
